code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant browser
    participant server

    Note right of browser: User writes input and clicks Save button
    browser->>server: POST https://studies.cs.helsinki.fi/exampleapp/new_note
    activate server
    Note left of server: Server stores note in notes array
    server-->>browser: 302 Found, location: /exampleapp/notes
    deactivate server


    browser->>server: GET https://studies.cs.helsinki.fi/exampleapp/notes
    activate server
    server-->>browser: HTML document
    deactivate server

    browser->>server: GET https://studies.cs.helsinki.fi/exampleapp/main.css
    activate server
    server-->>browser: the css file
    deactivate server

    browser->>server: GET https://studies.cs.helsinki.fi/exampleapp/main.js
    activate server
    server-->>browser: the JavaScript file
    deactivate server

    Note right of browser: The browser starts executing the JavaScript code that fetches the JSON from the server

    browser->>server: GET https://studies.cs.helsinki.fi/exampleapp/data.json
    activate server
    server-->>browser: [Security_Firewall}, ..., {Security_ZeroTrust} ]
    deactivate server

    Note right of browser: The browser executes the callback function that renders the notes

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的单页应用笔记提交流程。用户先在浏览器里写内容，点击保存，然后浏览器向服务器发送POST请求，地址是exampleapp/new_note。
明白，那服务器收到POST之后怎么处理？需要画激活条吗？
需要激活条。服务器把笔记存到notes数组里，然后返回302重定向，让浏览器跳转到/exampleapp/notes。重定向之后浏览器会重新获取页面。
好的，我把302返回和后续的GET请求都画上了。接下来是不是还要加载CSS和JavaScript文件？
对，浏览器拿到HTML之后，会并行请求main.css和main.js。这两个GET都需要单独画激活条。
CSS和JS都加上了。JS执行之后，浏览器会去取data.json对吧？
没错，但JSON返回的内容要体现安全主题——里面包含Security_Firewall和Security_ZeroTrust这样的笔记对象。最后浏览器执行回调函数把笔记渲染出来。
都画好了。我在浏览器右侧加了三个注释：用户点击保存、开始执行JS代码获取JSON、最后执行回调渲染笔记。整个流程从POST提交到最终渲染都完整了。
elements_involved: User writes input and clicks Save button
The browser starts executing the JavaScript code that fetches the JSON from the server
The browser executes the callback function that renders the notes
